title: athrixia debilis
intro: Athrixia debilis, also known as African tea plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Athrixia debilis include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Athrixia debilis can be made into teas, infusions, or extracts, and are often used to treat various health conditions.
